# uapi_lldpd_config (Data Source)

The global lldpd daemon settings (uci lldpd.lldpd).

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "uapi_lldpd_config" "this" {}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `enable_cdp` (Boolean) Whether Cisco Discovery Protocol advertisement is enabled.
- `enable_edp` (Boolean) Whether Extreme Discovery Protocol advertisement is enabled.
- `enable_fdp` (Boolean) Whether Foundry Discovery Protocol advertisement is enabled.
- `enable_lldpmed` (Boolean) Whether LLDP-MED advertisement is enabled.
- `enable_sonmp` (Boolean) Whether Nortel SONMP advertisement is enabled.
- `etag` (String) Opaque ETag of the resource's current state.
- `id` (String) Stable id of the lldpd config section.
- `interface` (List of String) Network interfaces lldpd listens on. Empty means all interfaces.
- `lldp_capabilities` (Boolean) Whether system capabilities are advertised.
- `lldp_class` (String) LLDP-MED device class (1-4).
- `lldp_description` (Boolean) Whether the system description is advertised.
- `lldp_mgmt_ip` (String) Management IP address advertised.
- `managed` (Boolean) Whether the underlying uci section is uapi-managed.
